major_arcana.name: The Fool
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Spirit of Aethyr
major_arcana.thoth_description: A naked youth with a wild, ecstatic expression leaps from a precipice. Below him a tiger bites his thigh and a crocodile waits. He holds a wand with a flaming sun. A dove with a rose descends. The coat of many colours signifies infinite potential.

major_arcana.name: The Magus
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Magus of Power
major_arcana.thoth_description: A winged figure in yellow juggling symbols of Mercury — the wand, cup, sword and pentacle — in perpetual motion. The Ape of Thoth crouches below. All is communication, skill and divine trickery.

major_arcana.name: The Priestess
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Priestess of the Silver Star
major_arcana.thoth_description: An enthroned woman of cold luminous beauty sits before the veil of the sanctuary. She holds a bow. The moon is her crown. Camels and palms surround her. She is pure potential, the great mystery unrevealed.

major_arcana.name: The Empress
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Daughter of the Mighty Ones
major_arcana.thoth_description: A voluptuous woman enthroned amid abundant nature. She holds the lotus wand and shield of the heraldic eagle. Sparrows and doves flock to her. She is fertility, abundance and the great mother of all.

major_arcana.name: The Emperor
major_arcana.thoth_title: Sun of the Morning, Chief Among the Mighty
major_arcana.thoth_description: A powerful armoured figure seated on a stone throne adorned with rams. He holds an orb and sceptre. His red robes blaze with authority. He is Mars and Aries combined — the dynamic force of empire and will.

major_arcana.name: The Hierophant
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Magus of the Eternal Gods
major_arcana.thoth_description: An enthroned priest in rich vestments raises one hand in blessing. Below him kneel two acolytes. The pentagram blazes above. He is the bridge between divine mystery and earthly institution.

major_arcana.name: The Lovers
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Children of the Voice Divine
major_arcana.thoth_description: A robed and hooded priest unites a dark king with a fair queen beneath a great figure of Cupid. An Orphic egg blazes at the centre. This is the alchemical marriage, the union of opposites in sacred conjunction.

major_arcana.name: The Chariot
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Child of the Powers of the Waters
major_arcana.thoth_description: A warrior in amber armour rides a chariot drawn by four sphinxes. Above him is a starry canopy. He bears the Holy Grail. He conquers by yielding — the will channelled through the unconscious tides.

major_arcana.name: Adjustment
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Daughter of the Lords of Truth
major_arcana.thoth_description: A masked figure in diamond armour holds perfectly balanced scales and an upraised sword. She stands on tiptoe upon the sword point. She is absolute cosmic justice — karma, equilibrium and the adjustment of all force.

major_arcana.name: The Hermit
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Magus of the Voice of Power
major_arcana.thoth_description: An ancient figure wrapped in a grey cloak holds a lantern containing the sun. At his feet crouches Cerberus. He walks upon wheat. He is the secret seed of all becoming — the divine spark hidden in matter.

major_arcana.name: Fortune
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Lord of the Forces of Life
major_arcana.thoth_description: A great wheel turns in space surrounded by the four kerubic beasts. On the wheel ascend Hermanubis and descend Typhon, while the Sphinx sits balanced at the top. This is the ceaseless revolution of cosmic law.

major_arcana.name: Lust
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Daughter of the Flaming Sword
major_arcana.thoth_description: The Scarlet Woman Babalon rides a great seven-headed beast, holding the Holy Grail aloft. She is intoxicated with the saints she has absorbed. This is sacred ecstasy — the creative fire of spiritual courage.

major_arcana.name: The Hanged Man
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Spirit of the Mighty Waters
major_arcana.thoth_description: A figure hangs suspended upside down from an ankh cross, serene and haloed. He dissolves into the great waters beneath. This is redemption through surrender — the willing sacrifice that brings enlightenment.

major_arcana.name: Death
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Child of the Great Transformers
major_arcana.thoth_description: A skeleton dances in the dance of death, wielding a scythe through a swarm of bubbles containing the forms of life. The scorpion, serpent and eagle surround the scene. This is transformation — the ecstatic power of destruction and renewal.

major_arcana.name: Art
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Daughter of the Reconcilers
major_arcana.thoth_description: A hermaphroditic figure pours fire and water simultaneously into a great cauldron. The sun and moon, the lion and eagle are united. This is the Great Work — the alchemical process of combining opposites into a higher unity.

major_arcana.name: The Devil
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Lord of the Gates of Matter
major_arcana.thoth_description: A vast, leering goat-headed figure dominates the card. The creative generative force is depicted with raw physicality. This is Pan — the all, the dark side of creation, ecstatic material energy entirely amoral.

major_arcana.name: The Tower
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Lord of the Hosts of the Mighty
major_arcana.thoth_description: A great tower is struck by the eye of God blazing as a lightning bolt. Figures tumble from its battlements into the abyss. The dove and serpent descend. This is divine wrath demolishing false structures.

major_arcana.name: The Star
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Daughter of the Firmament
major_arcana.thoth_description: The goddess Nuit arches her starry body over the universe. A figure below pours water from two cups into a pool. Seven stars blaze around one great star. This is hope, inspiration and the infinite body of night.

major_arcana.name: The Moon
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Ruler of Flux and Reflux
major_arcana.thoth_description: The great scarab Khephra pushes the sun through the underworld. Two Anubis figures stand between two towers on a moonlit path. A dog and wolf howl. A crayfish emerges from the deep. This is the dark night of the soul.

major_arcana.name: The Sun
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Lord of the Fire of the World
major_arcana.thoth_description: Two children dance together in a sunlit garden wearing rose wreaths. The great sun blazes above with twelve rays. A butterfly rests nearby. This is consciousness, joy, integration and the light of reason illuminating all.

major_arcana.name: The Aeon
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Spirit of the Primal Fire
major_arcana.thoth_description: The family of the new aeon: Nuit arches above as the night sky, Hadit flames at the centre, and Ra-Hoor-Khuit enthroned below. The child Hoor-paar-Kraat sits silent. This is the dawning of a new cosmic era replacing the old Judgement card.

major_arcana.name: The Universe
major_arcana.thoth_title: The Great One of the Night of Time
major_arcana.thoth_description: A woman dances within an oval of brilliant light, surrounded by the four kerubic beasts at the corners. Great serpents coil at her feet. She is matter in its most refined form — the universe crystallised into perfection.

wands.name: Ace of Wands
wands.thoth_title: The Root of the Powers of Fire
wands.thoth_description: A great torch blazes, held by a divine hand emerging from clouds. Ten Yod letters fall like flames around it. This is pure primal fire — creative will at its most potent and undifferentiated.

wands.name: Two of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Two crossed wands blaze with fire. This is the first manifestation of primal force — bold dominion and the will to power at the outset of action.

wands.name: Three of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Three wands arranged in a lotus pattern blaze steadily. This is virtue established — the will consolidated and expressed through integrity and established strength.

wands.name: Four of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Four wands form a complete circle of fire. This is the perfection of work — settlement, completion and the joyful arrival at a goal achieved.

wands.name: Five of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Five wands clash at violent angles. This is strife and struggle — creative tension, competition and the turbulence of ambition meeting resistance.

wands.name: Six of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Six wands arranged in triumph, crowned with laurel. This is victory — the fire of will triumphant, success after struggle and the joy of achievement.

wands.name: Seven of Wands
wands.thoth_description: One wand stands against six opponents. This is valour — raw courage in the face of opposition, holding one's ground through sheer force of will.

wands.name: Eight of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Eight wands fly through the air like bolts of lightning. This is swiftness — rapid communication, the speed of thought and the electric energy of ideas in motion.

wands.name: Nine of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Nine wands bound with arrows stand in readiness. This is strength — the great reserve of force held in potential, the warrior resting between battles.

wands.name: Ten of Wands
wands.thoth_description: Ten wands press downward with crushing weight. This is oppression — force turned against itself, the creative fire become tyranny and overbearing burden.

wands.name: Princess of Wands
wands.thoth_description: A fierce naked princess leaps with a wand before an altar of fire. A tiger crouches behind her. She is volatile, passionate energy — the earthly manifestation of fire, wild and untameable.

wands.name: Prince of Wands
wands.thoth_title: Prince of the Chariot of Fire
wands.thoth_description: A proud prince rides a chariot drawn by a lion, holding a flaming wand. His crown blazes. This is the airy part of fire — swift creative intelligence, noble ambition and passionate idealism.

wands.name: Queen of Wands
wands.thoth_title: Queen of the Thrones of Flame
wands.thoth_description: A queen enthroned holds a wand above a crouching leopard. A crown of fire blazes above sunflowers. She is the watery part of fire — magnetic, creative, passionate and commanding in nature.

wands.name: Knight of Wands
wands.thoth_title: Lord of the Flame and Lightning
wands.thoth_description: A dark armoured knight rides a great black horse through flames, brandishing a wand. He is the fiery part of fire — pure impulsive force, war-like energy and fierce spiritual passion.

cups.name: Ace of Cups
cups.thoth_title: The Root of the Powers of Water
cups.thoth_description: A great cup overflows with water and lotus flowers, held by a divine hand. A pelican feeds its young from its own breast. This is pure water — love, intuition and the great unconscious at their source.

cups.name: Two of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Two cups intertwined with lotus blossoms overflow together. This is love — the meeting of souls in perfect harmony, mutual attraction and the joy of union.

cups.name: Three of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Three cups overflow with abundance and pomegranates. This is abundance — the joyful overflow of emotion, celebration and the richness of shared feeling.

cups.name: Four of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Four cups rest upon the sea amid water lilies. This is luxury — emotional satiety tending toward excess, the pleasure principle indulged to the point of stagnation.

cups.name: Five of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Five cups stand in dejection, some overturned. Dark waters surround them. This is disappointment — the grief of loss, emotional disillusionment and the pain of broken hope.

cups.name: Six of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Six cups adorned with flowers glow warmly. This is pleasure — the sweetness of past happiness, innocent joy, and the emotional warmth of beautiful memories.

cups.name: Seven of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Seven cups filled with dark, corrupted waters. Lotuses droop and decay. This is debauch — emotional excess leading to degradation, fantasy divorced from reality.

cups.name: Eight of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Eight cups stand in murky stagnant water. The lotuses are withered. This is indolence — emotional stagnation, the paralysis of feeling and the failure to act.

cups.name: Nine of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Nine cups overflow in radiant fullness. This is happiness — complete emotional satisfaction, the wish fulfilled and the material joy of life at its most abundant.

cups.name: Ten of Cups
cups.thoth_description: Ten cups overflow but with a sense of too much — the lotuses begin to corrupt. This is satiety — emotional fulfilment tipping into excess, satisfaction becoming cloying.

cups.name: Princess of Cups
cups.thoth_description: A gentle princess stands in a sea of lotus blossoms, holding a shell-cup from which a turtle emerges. A swan rests beside her. She is dreamy, imaginative and receptive — the earthy part of water.

cups.name: Prince of Cups
cups.thoth_title: Prince of the Chariot of the Waters
cups.thoth_description: A prince in a chariot drawn by an eagle holds a cup from which a serpent rises. Lotuses bloom around him. He is subtle, intellectual and emotionally complex — the airy part of water.

cups.name: Queen of Cups
cups.thoth_title: Queen of the Thrones of the Waters
cups.thoth_description: A queen enthroned on water holds a covered cup. Ibises and lotus surround her. She is deeply intuitive, dreamy and visionary — the watery part of water, pure reflective consciousness.

cups.name: Knight of Cups
cups.thoth_title: Lord of the Waves and the Waters
cups.thoth_description: A knight on a white horse rides above calm waters, holding a cup with a crab inside. His helmet bears a peacock. He is the fiery part of water — grace, romantic idealism and spiritual aspiration.

swords.name: Ace of Swords
swords.thoth_title: The Root of the Powers of Air
swords.thoth_description: A great sword crowned with a divine crown thrusts upward, surrounded by serpents, olive and palm branches. This is pure mind — intellect at its most absolute and piercing.

swords.name: Two of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Two swords crossed in perfect balance, adorned with a rose. This is peace — the equilibrium of mind, the truce of warring forces and the calm of balanced intellect.

swords.name: Three of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Three swords pierce a heart amid dark stormy clouds. This is sorrow — the grief of the intellect, heartbreak and the pain of understanding without the power to change.

swords.name: Four of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Four swords rest in stillness around a rose cross. This is truce — the ceasefire of the mind, retreat from conflict to gather strength and the restful pause of contemplation.

swords.name: Five of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Five swords lie broken and scattered. This is defeat — the failure of intellect, humiliation and the collapse of plans through inner weakness.

swords.name: Six of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Six swords arranged in a perfect geometric flower pattern around a rose cross. This is science — the triumph of pure intellect, the harmony of thought and the beauty of abstract truth.

swords.name: Seven of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Seven swords in an unstable scattered arrangement. This is futility — the inefficiency of misdirected thought, plans that cannot succeed and the frustration of wasted intellect.

swords.name: Eight of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Eight swords crowd together, dominated by two great blades. This is interference — conflicting thoughts, restriction of action and the confusion of too many ideas clashing.

swords.name: Nine of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Nine swords drip blood and rust. This is cruelty — the mind turned against itself, despair and the vicious cycle of obsessive dark thought.

swords.name: Ten of Swords
swords.thoth_description: Ten swords in total shattered destruction. This is ruin — the complete collapse of mental structures, absolute defeat and the catastrophic end of a cycle.

swords.name: Princess of Swords
swords.thoth_description: A fierce princess rushes forward with an upraised sword before a smoking altar. Storm clouds swirl. She is fierce, determined and cutting — the earthy part of air, intellect made material and ruthless.

swords.name: Prince of Swords
swords.thoth_title: Prince of the Chariot of the Winds
swords.thoth_description: A prince in a chariot propelled by fairies and winds wields many swords. Ideas swirl around him. He is the airy part of air — brilliant, analytical, changeable and driven by pure intellect.

swords.name: Queen of Swords
swords.thoth_title: Queen of the Thrones of Air
swords.thoth_description: A cold queen enthroned on clouds holds an upright sword and a severed head. She is merciless perception — the watery part of air, grief transformed into piercing insight.

swords.name: Knight of Swords
swords.thoth_title: Lord of the Winds and the Breezes
swords.thoth_description: A knight charges at full gallop through a violent storm, wielding multiple swords. Ravens and swallows are swept in the wind. He is the fiery part of air — ferocious intellectual energy and destructive brilliance.

disks.name: Ace of Disks
disks.thoth_title: The Root of the Powers of Earth
disks.thoth_description: A great disk bearing a winged hexagram and seven-pointed star is held by a divine hand. This is pure earth — material manifestation at its most potent, the seed of all material existence.

disks.name: Two of Disks
disks.thoth_description: Two disks entwined in a serpent Ouroboros in yin-yang configuration. This is change — the eternal flux of material fortune, the endless cycle of gain and loss.

disks.name: Three of Disks
disks.thoth_description: Three disks in a geometric triangular arrangement. This is works — skilled labour, the craft of creation and the satisfaction of material work well done.

disks.name: Four of Disks
symbols: four disks at corners of a fortress
disks.thoth_description: Four disks arranged at the corners of a fortress. This is power — stability established, material consolidation and the security of worldly achievement.

disks.name: Five of Disks
disks.thoth_description: Five disks in an inverted pentagram arrangement on dark ground. This is worry — material anxiety, financial insecurity and the grinding stress of earthly hardship.

disks.name: Six of Disks
disks.thoth_description: Six disks arranged in a beautiful rose pattern. This is success — material prosperity, the abundance of the harvest and the satisfaction of earthly achievement.

disks.name: Seven of Disks
symbols: seven disks in cross of failure
disks.thoth_description: Seven disks arranged in a cross of lead, heavy with corruption. This is failure — the collapse of material endeavour, bad investment and the bitterness of wasted effort.

disks.name: Eight of Disks
disks.thoth_description: Eight disks arranged like fruit on a tree. This is prudence — careful, methodical work, the craftsman's patient skill and the steady accumulation of material mastery.

disks.name: Nine of Disks
disks.thoth_description: Nine disks arranged in three rows of three glow with material warmth. This is gain — the comfortable accumulation of wealth, material security and the pleasure of earthly abundance.

disks.name: Ten of Disks
symbols: ten disks in Tree of Life
disks.thoth_description: Ten disks arranged in the pattern of the Tree of Life, heavy with wealth. This is wealth — material perfection, the completion of earthly endeavour and the rich legacy of accumulated fortune.

disks.name: Princess of Disks
disks.thoth_description: A sturdy princess stands in a sacred grove before an altar, holding a wand surmounted by a diamond. She contemplates a great disk. She is fertile, patient and earthy — the most material of all court cards.

disks.name: Prince of Disks
disks.thoth_title: Prince of the Chariot of Earth
disks.thoth_description: A methodical prince rides a chariot drawn by a bull, holding an orb. Wheat and flowers surround him. He is the airy part of earth — practical intelligence, material planning and steady industriousness.

disks.name: Queen of Disks
disks.thoth_title: Queen of the Thrones of Earth
disks.thoth_description: A great queen enthroned on rocky ground holds a disk bearing a goat. Despite barren surroundings, flowers bloom at her feet. She is the watery part of earth — nurturing, practical and deeply sensual.

disks.name: Knight of Disks
disks.thoth_title: Lord of the Wild and Fertile Land
disks.thoth_description: A stolid knight on a heavy horse holds a flail and a disk bearing wheat. He surveys fertile farmland. He is the fiery part of earth — patient, enduring, productive and utterly reliable material energy.
